title: Add simple tagging for saved scans

requirements.text: Extend the saved-scan data model persisted in localStorage to support user-defined tags per saved scan, while maintaining backward compatibility with already-saved scans that have no tags.

quotes: Your update with the delete option is ready — want to add simple tagging for easier photo organization next?

acceptanceCriteria: Existing saved scans already stored under the current localStorage key load without errors and are treated as having an empty tags list.
Newly saved scans can store tags in the same localStorage record structure (no new storage mechanism required).
Tags are persisted across reloads and reflected consistently in in-memory state and localStorage.

requirements.text: Add UI controls in the Saved Scans gallery to create, edit, and remove tags on a per-scan basis using clear, English user-facing labels.

quotes: want to add simple tagging for easier photo organization next?

acceptanceCriteria: Each saved scan item in the gallery has an affordance to manage tags (add/remove/edit) without opening developer tools.
Tag entry supports keyboard-only use (can add a tag, remove a tag, and exit the control).
All new/updated user-facing text related to tagging is in English.

requirements.text: Add a simple tag-based filtering/search capability in the Saved Scans gallery so users can quickly narrow the list to scans matching a selected tag or entered tag text.

quotes: simple tagging for easier photo organization

acceptanceCriteria: When a filter is applied, only scans whose tags match the selected/entered tag are shown.
Clearing the filter restores the full gallery list.
If there are no saved scans, the existing empty-state UI still renders correctly and does not show broken filter controls.

constraints: Frontend must not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui or the immutable hook files listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
Keep saved scans persistence client-side (localStorage) consistent with the existing approach (no new backend canister storage for scans).
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Syncing tags across devices or accounts.
Backend storage or querying of saved scans/tags.
AI-based pest identification or automatic tag suggestions.
